Refined_Metal.flavorText: Iron may corode, but its ease of production makes it an ideal material on Icarus.

Metal_Ore.description: Natural iron ore of high purity, easily smelted.
Metal_Ore.flavorText: Iron ore is plentiful in the planetary crust, as on Earth. Requires the high temperatures of a furnace to refine into pure ingots.

Metal_Knife.description: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
Metal_Knife.flavorText: \'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore

Metal_Spear.description: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
Metal_Spear.flavorText: \'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman

Metal_Axe.description: An iron axe, for swifter felling and hewing.
Metal_Axe.flavorText: \'Technological progress is like an axe in the hands of a pathological criminal.\' -- Albert Einstein

Metal_Pickaxe.description: A strong iron pickaxe, for more rapid, reliable mining of basic stone.
Metal_Pickaxe.flavorText: An enduring if ironic icon of the so-called \'Exotics Rush\'.

Metal_Bolt.description: A hard-hitting iron bolt, trading distance for damage.
Metal_Bolt.flavorText: Roughly 64,000 years since its first invention, the essential form of the bolt remains unchanged.

Frag_Grenade_Impact.description: A fragmentation grenade that will explode on impact.

Sickle.description: An ancient, but efficient tool for harvesting from nature.
Sickle.flavorText: Delivers more resources with each swipe.

Shovel.description: Can be used to collect dirt and sand when digging, or shovel snow off your roof.
Shovel.flavorText: Shift snow, or bury a friend.

Wood_Floor_Refined.description: Light wooden flooring, best used internally.
Wood_Floor_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Wall_Refined.description: A light wooden wall, best used internally.
Wood_Wall_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Refined_Halfpiece.description: Half- and quarter-sized building elements for detailed construction work.
Wood_Refined_Halfpiece.flavorText: These sets are useful for creating walkways, balconies, trims and a range of other smaller constructions.

Wood_Refined_Half_Pitch.flavorText: A two part construction element, containing a base slope and an upper slope, for building low-pitched roofs.

Wood_Ramp_Refined.description: A light ramp, best used internally.
Wood_Ramp_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Wood_Door_Refined.description: A light wooden door, best suited to internal use.
Wood_Door_Refined.flavorText: Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Ice.description: Frozen water, can be melted for drinking.
Ice.flavorText: Store in a chilly bin or add to a campfire, with a water vessel, to collect drinkable water.

Wood_Railing_Refined.description: A light wooden railing for internal construction.

Wood_Railing_Gate_Refined.description: A light wooden railing gateway for interior use.

Wood_TrapDoor_Refined.flavorText: Attaches to a floor trapdoor structure. Less durable than basic wooden construction elements, refined materials will make your lumber go further, but require protection from the elements.

Interior_Wood_Beam.description: Anchors structures to the ground for higher building.
Interior_Wood_Beam.flavorText: Beams connect vertically and diagonally to support multi-level construction. Your HUD will indicate when beams are anchored with a blue cursor.

Interior_Wood_Cupboard.description: A place to keep items, gear and the rest.

IceBox.description: Stores food at low temperatures when supplied with ice.
IceBox.flavorText: The insulated icebox arrests food decay, as well as slowing the melting of ice itself. Has 10 storage slots.

Iron_Nail.flavorText: A nail works in two directions: through friction in the axial direction, and shear strength laterally.

Iron_Hammer.description: Maintain structures against the wrath of Icarus.
Iron_Hammer.flavorText: Counter the forces of nature with a little violence of your own.

Thermos_IceWater.description: Like a Canteen, but with better thermal protection

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Alpha.description: An axe geared towards felling trees and chopping lumber
Meta_Axe_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Discovering how to mine meteors really changed the game for Inaris

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Alpha.description: The perfect knife for hunting and skinning
Meta_Knife_Inaris_Alpha.flavorText: Inaris is partly owned by the Uniao alliance

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Alpha.description: A heavy tool to mine with off-world

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Alpha.description: Slow your foes with this hunting spear

Meta_Arrow_Set_Inaris_Alpha.description: 25 good value arrows, nothing less. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Envirosuit_Inaris.description: An envirosuit with plenty of slots for upgrades to keep on your person.
Meta_Envirosuit_Inaris.flavorText: Now there\'s a few less things to carry around with you.

Radar_Meta.description: Portable Exotics detection unit, uses an internal power system that attracts a large amount of wildlife when active. Approximate directional arc shown on your map.

Extractor_Meta.description: A portable mining unit powered by the IC-001 Power Source, used to extract resources from Exotics deposits.
Extractor_Meta.flavorText: Warning: Exotics extraction is known to aggravate nearby wildlife

Meta_Power_Source.description: Used to power the IC-001 Extractor. Single use. Cannot be returned to Station.
Meta_Power_Source.flavorText: WARNING: Handle with care, contains unstable material.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_A.description: A high powered Crossbow that\'s quick to reload.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_B.description: The heavy draw on this weapon causes a slower reload, but adds far more damage.
Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_B.flavorText: Be careful where you point that thing.

Ice_Borer.description: A biofuel-powered drill capable of extracting Super-Cooled Ice or Frozen Wood from Arctic areas.
Ice_Borer.flavorText: Slow progress, but it\'s worth it

Metal_Sledgehammer.description: Very heavy weapon that can be used to break rocks like Scoria and Obsidian.
Metal_Sledgehammer.flavorText: Can deal a lot of damage

Mission_Communication_Device_T3.description: An upgrade for the C0NT4CT Device that will allow access to encoded missions.

Metal_Throwing_Knife.description: A short, clip-point blade for better defense and swifter skinning.
Metal_Throwing_Knife.flavorText: \'A mind all logic is like a knife all blade. It makes the hand bleed that uses it.\' -- Rabindranath Tagore

Metal_Throwing_Spear.description: An iron spearhead, improving defensive power and range.
Metal_Throwing_Spear.flavorText: \'I throw a spear into the darkness. That is intuition. Then I must send an army into the darkness to find the spear. That is intellect.\' -- Ingmar Bergman

Iron_Lure.description: A heavier lure carefully crafted out of iron, to attract more fish.
Iron_Lure.flavorText: Surely you\'ll catch a big one with this in your kit.

Volatile_Substance_Inert.description: Formally highly explosive substance made from locally found materials native to Icarus.

Infected_Bark.description: A piece of twisted and crumbling bark, can be stripped for Epoxy. Toxic to humans, this will damage you when carried.
Infected_Bark.flavorText: Exotics have been shown to warp and twist DNA on a molecular level, it would seem no living thing is safe.

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Bravo.description: Sturdy arrows that fly mostly true

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Bravo.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Bravo_x25.description: Sturdy arrows that fly mostly true

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Cheaply mined metal keeps costs down for Inaris

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Charlie.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Charlie.flavorText: Cheaply mined metal keeps costs down for Inaris

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Charlie_x25.flavorText: Cheaply mined metal keeps costs down for Inaris

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Inaris may not be the best, but they certainly aren\'t the worst

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Delta.description: A set of 25 well engineered, lightweight arrows. \'CONSUME\' to open bundle.
Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Set_Delta.flavorText: Inaris may not be the best, but they certainly aren\'t the worst

Meta_Arrow_Inaris_Delta_x25.flavorText: Inaris may not be the best, but they certainly aren\'t the worst

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Bravo.flavorText: Brutal, but it gets the job done

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Charlie.description: A trusty blade to keep by your side
Meta_Knife_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Perfect for hurling at your enemies

Meta_Knife_Inaris_Delta.description: The perfect knife to hone your skills with

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Charlie.description: A solid addition to your belt

Meta_Axe_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Uniao owns the site of Earth\'s first space elevator

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Bravo.description: A metal base gives this mining axe great grip
Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Bravo.flavorText: Mining is where all began for Inaris

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Charlie.description: A base model that performs well

Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Delta.description: A sturdy pickaxe that gets the job done
Meta_Pickaxe_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Perfect for mining, or scaring away that pesky wildlife

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Bravo.description: A sturdily built spear with excellent grip

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Charlie.description: A well made spear that\'s also lightweight
Meta_Spear_Inaris_Charlie.flavorText: Inaris are central players in the off-world mining industry

Meta_Spear_Inaris_Delta.description: A reliable addition to your arsenal
Meta_Spear_Inaris_Delta.flavorText: Keep your weapons by your side, you\'ll never know when you\'ll need them

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_C.description: A reliable crossbow to give you an edge in combat.
Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_C.flavorText: Hated by bears all over Icarus.

Meta_Crossbow_Inaris_D.flavorText: This should give you an edge against the wildlife.

Farming_CropPlot_T3_v2.description: A sturdy option for farming with water intake for faster crop growth. Fully-grown crops left too long will eventually wither and only provide spoiled plants.
Farming_CropPlot_T3_v2.flavorText: Can be connected to a water network

Iron_Ore_Stack_100.description: Natural iron ore of high purity, easily smelted.
Iron_Ore_Stack_100.flavorText: Iron ore is plentiful in the planetary crust, as on Earth. Requires the high temperatures of a furnace to refine into pure ingots.

Tech_Backpack.description: A handy backpack to assist your creative endeavours.

Lava_Viscid_Head.description: A preserved memory of a once-great Ignari.
Lava_Viscid_Head.flavorText: Who knew taxidermy would be so popular on Icarus?

Lava_Viscid_Trophy.flavorText: Evidence of skill, patience and accuracy.

Ice_Armor_Fragment.description: An ice armor fragment taken after battle with a fearsome creature.

Metal_Table.description: A sleek and minimalist round metal table.
Metal_Table.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Dining6.description: A sleek and minimalist metal table.
Metal_Table_Dining6.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Table_Dining10.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dining table.
Metal_Table_Dining10.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Living.description: A sleek and minimalist metal chair.
Metal_Chair_Living.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Living_2Seater.description: A sleek and minimalist metal two seater couch.
Metal_Chair_Living_2Seater.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Sitting.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bench.
Metal_Chair_Sitting.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Chair_Dining.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dining chair.
Metal_Chair_Dining.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Shelf_Wall.description: A sleek and minimalist metal wall shelf.
Metal_Shelf_Wall.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Display_Cabinet.description: A sleek and minimalist metal display cabinet.
Metal_Display_Cabinet.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Wardrobe.description: A sleek and minimalist metal wardrobe.
Metal_Wardrobe.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Candles.description: A sleek and minimalist metal candlestick.
Metal_Candles.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Dresser.description: A sleek and minimalist metal dresser.
Metal_Dresser.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Metal_Stool.description: A sleek and minimalist metal stool.
Metal_Metal_Stool.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Metal_Nightstand.description: A sleek and minimalist metal nightstand.
Metal_Metal_Nightstand.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Metal_Bed.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bed.
Metal_Metal_Bed.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Metal_Bookshelf.description: A sleek and minimalist metal bookshelf.
Metal_Metal_Bookshelf.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Metal_Lamp.description: A sleek and minimalist metal lamp.
Metal_Metal_Lamp.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Metal_Metal_CoffeeTable.description: A sleek and minimalist metal coffee table.
Metal_Metal_CoffeeTable.flavorText: Designed for functionality and a touch of urban elegance.

Ice_Halfpiece.description: A basic half-piece for your walls.
Ice_Halfpiece.flavorText: There are sixteen different types of ice that have been recorded on Earth.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_00.description: A sickle designed for reaping as many seeds as possible.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_01.description: A sickle infused with distilled miasmic coating to provide bonuses when harvesting.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_02.description: A sickle which emits heats thanks to its obsidian core.

Meta_Sickle_Inaris_03.description: A sickle that is kept frosty due to the research into super cooled ice.

Iron_Shears.description: Used to Shear Sheep and Collect its Wool
Iron_Shears.flavorText: Just like they had in the old country.

Wood_Railing_Gate_Refined_V2.description: A light wooden railing for internal construction, with a gate for easy access.

Iron_Bucket.description: A bucket that can be filled with water.
Iron_Bucket.flavorText: Everyone should at least have one of these.

Prop_Industrial_Sign_Square.description: A sign used in industrial sites and lab for conveying information.
Prop_Industrial_Sign_Square.flavorText: At least the UDA has SOME safety regulations.

Prop_Industrial_Sign_Triangle.description: A sign used in industrial sites and lab for conveying information.
Prop_Industrial_Sign_Triangle.flavorText: At least the UDA has SOME safety regulations.

Prop_Industrial_Sign_Diamond.description: A sign used in industrial sites and lab for conveying information.
Prop_Industrial_Sign_Diamond.flavorText: At least the UDA has SOME safety regulations.
